privileged_info_summary: This task operates on iDempiere 12's GardenWorld demo database. The warehouse target 'HQ Warehouse' is a standard warehouse in the GardenWorld database, verified through references in multiple other tasks (create_physical_inventory, create_inventory_move). The task requires creating three new synthetic locators (OV-01-01, OV-01-02, OV-01-03) in HQ Warehouse with coordinates representing an Overstock Zone at Aisle 1, Bin 1, Levels 1-3. All metadata values (warehouse name and locator specifications) are internally consistent across task.json, verifier.py, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh. The setup script explicitly deactivates these three locators before the task begins to ensure a clean state, confirming they are synthetic test data created for this task.
